where.if: AND (e.exmy1_id ILIKE '%'||#{searchValue}||'%' OR e.exmy2_id ILIKE '%'||#{searchValue}||'%' OR e.exmy3_id ILIKE '%'||#{searchValue}||'%' OR e.col31 ILIKE '%'||#{searchValue}||'%' OR e.col32 ILIKE '%'||#{searchValue}||'%' OR e.col33 ILIKE '%'||#{searchValue}||'%' OR e.col34 ILIKE '%'||#{searchValue}||'%' OR e.col35 ILIKE '%'||#{searchValue}||'%')

mapper.select: SELECT /* base.zz :: ZzExmy3 :: selectById */ e.exmy1_id, e.exmy2_id, e.exmy3_id, e.col31, e.col32, e.col33, e.col34, e.col35, e.reg_by, e.reg_date, e.upd_by, e.upd_date FROM shopjoy_2604.zz_exmy3 e WHERE e.exmy1_id = #{exmy1Id} AND e.exmy2_id = #{exmy2Id} AND e.exmy3_id = #{exmy3Id}

SELECT /* base.zz :: ZzExmy3 :: selectList */ e.exmy1_id, e.exmy2_id, e.exmy3_id, e.col31, e.col32, e.col33, e.col34, e.col35, e.reg_by, e.reg_date, e.upd_by, e.upd_date FROM shopjoy_2604.zz_exmy3 e
ORDER BY e.exmy1_id ASC, e.exmy2_id ASC, e.exmy3_id ASC

SELECT /* base.zz :: ZzExmy3 :: selectPageList */ e.exmy1_id, e.exmy2_id, e.exmy3_id, e.col31, e.col32, e.col33, e.col34, e.col35, e.reg_by, e.reg_date, e.upd_by, e.upd_date FROM shopjoy_2604.zz_exmy3 e
ORDER BY e.exmy1_id ASC, e.exmy2_id ASC, e.exmy3_id ASC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(e.*) /* base.zz :: ZzExmy3 :: selectPageCount */ FROM shopjoy_2604.zz_exmy3 e
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO shopjoy_2604.zz_exmy3 /* base.zz :: ZzExmy3 :: insert */ (exmy1_id, exmy2_id, exmy3_id, col31, col32, col33, col34, col35, reg_by, reg_date, upd_by, upd_date) VALUES (#{exmy1Id}, #{exmy2Id}, #{exmy3Id}, #{col31}, #{col32}, #{col33}, #{col34}, #{col35}, #{regBy}, #{regDate}, #{updBy}, #{updDate})
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM shopjoy_2604.zz_exmy3 /* base.zz :: ZzExmy3 :: delete */ WHERE exmy1_id = #{exmy1Id} AND exmy2_id = #{exmy2Id} AND exmy3_id = #{exmy3Id}
